parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: Identifier of the app.

post.description:
Restores a soft-deleted Qlik Cloud Analytics application to the same space with the same app ID, retaining the properties it had at the time of deletion.
This operation is available to the app owner and Tenant Admins. The app owner can restore the app only if the original space still exists and they still have delete permission in the space; otherwise, a 403 Forbidden error is returned.
Associated resources such as data alerts, subscriptions, collections, notes, and tags are deleted when the app is deleted and cannot be restored.

400.description: Bad request. The request contains invalid or missing parameters.

403.description: Access denied. You lack the required permissions to list evaluations for this app.

404.description: The specified app was not found.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app.

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: When `true`, includes full evaluation details in each result. When `false`, detail fields are omitted.

parameters.name: fileMode
parameters.description: When `true`, adds file download headers to the response.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The output format for the response. Accepts `json` or `xml`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: next
parameters.description: A cursor token for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: prev
parameters.description: A cursor token for fetching the previous page of results.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The field to sort results by. Prefix with `-` for descending order or `+` for ascending.

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of historical evaluations for the specified app. Use
the `next` and `prev` cursor values from the response links to navigate through
pages of results.

400.description: Bad request. The app identifier is missing or invalid.

403.description: Access denied. You lack the required permissions to evaluate the app.

404.description: The specified app was not found.

429.description: The rate limit has been exceeded.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app to evaluate.

post.description:
Queues a performance and scalability evaluation for the specified app, scheduling
it for execution by the evaluation engine. The evaluation measures object response
times, CPU usage, document size, and data model metrics. Once queued, use the
returned `id` with the retrieval operations to poll for results.

404.description: One or both of the specified app evaluations were not found.

parameters.name: baselineId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the baseline app evaluation.

parameters.name: comparisonId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the comparison app evaluation.

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: When `true`, includes all comparison entries regardless of significance.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The output format for the response. Accepts `json` or `xml`.

get.description:
Compares exactly two app evaluations, a baseline and a comparison, returning a structured
diff of performance metrics between them. Use this operation to detect regressions
after app changes or engine upgrades. Both evaluations must belong to the same app.

404.description: One or both of the specified app evaluations were not found.

parameters.name: baselineId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the baseline app evaluation.

parameters.name: comparisonId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the comparison app evaluation.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: The desired response format. Accepts `application/xml` (default) or `application/json`.

get.description:
Downloads a comparison log for the two specified app evaluations (baseline and comparison),
defaulting to XML format. Use the `Accept` header to request JSON output instead.
Both evaluations must belong to the same app.

404.description: The specified app evaluation was not found.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app evaluation to retrieve.

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: When `true`, includes full app evaluation details in the response.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The output format for the response. Accepts `json` or `xml`.

get.description:
Retrieves a single app evaluation by its unique identifier. Use the `all` parameter
to include full evaluation details in the response.

404.description: The specified app evaluation was not found.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app evaluation to download.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: The desired response format. Accepts `application/xml` (default) or `application/json`.

get.description:
Downloads the evaluation log for the specified app evaluation, defaulting to XML
format. Use the `Accept` header to request JSON output instead.

code.description: A unique code for the error.

title.description: A human-readable description of the error.

errors.description: Array of all errors that occurred during the request.

create.description: Object create privileges. Hints to the client what type of objects the user is allowed to create.

privileges.description:
Application privileges.
Hints to the client what actions the user is allowed to perform.
Could be any of:
* read
* create
* update
* delete
* reload
* import
* publish
* duplicate
* export
* exportdata
* change_owner
* change_space

resource.description: Type of resource. For example, sheet, story, bookmark, etc.

canCreate.description: Is set to true if the user has privileges to create the resource.

state.description:
Promotion state of the app.
Promotion state of an app.
One of:
* EMPTY
* PROMOTED
* DISTRIBUTED

usage.description:
Indicates the use for the app.

One of:
* ANALYTICS
* DATA_PREPARATION
* DATAFLOW_PREP
* SINGLE_TABLE_PREP
* DIRECT_QUERY_MODE

spaceId.description: The ID of the app's space.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the app was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the app was modified.

promotedAt.description: The date and time when the app was promoted, empty if not promoted. Use to determine if an app is promoted in Qlik Cloud.

reloadedAt.description: Date and time of the last reload of the app.

originAppId.description: The Origin App ID for promoted apps.

hasSectionAccess.description: If set to true, the app has section access configured.

region.description: The region the tenant is hosted in

tenant.description: Name of the tenant that will be called
